_note: Illustrative curated snapshot of public-style policy text for a prototype. Not legal advice.
chunks: Money-back guarantee: If your impression kit shows that clear aligners are not right for you, or your case is not accepted, we will refund the full cost of your impression kit and any aligner plan you purchased.

Before treatment begins: You can request a full refund of your aligner plan any time before your aligners are manufactured. Once you approve your 3D treatment preview, your aligners move into production and refund eligibility changes.

After aligners are manufactured: Once your custom aligners have been produced and shipped, the plan is generally non-refundable because each set is made specifically for you. If you experience a fit, quality, or clinical issue, contact support so we can open a case and arrange a remake or remediation.

Impression kit refunds: Unused impression kits can be returned within 30 days of delivery for a refund. Kits that have been opened or used are eligible for replacement if they arrive damaged, defective, or incomplete.
How to start a refund: Reply to your order confirmation email or contact support with your order number. Refunds are issued to the original payment method and can take 5–10 business days to appear.

Financing and monthly plans: If you are on a monthly payment plan, refund eligibility follows the same treatment-stage rules. Outstanding balances and already-shipped aligners are handled case by case by a support agent.
